office.phone.look.speaker: Hazel
lines: In detective work, that usually means either a client or a bill collector.

case001.phone.answer.speaker: Client
lines: My argument disappeared halfway through dinner, and now my family agrees with everyone.

choices.text: Are you sure the cat was involved?

case001.phone.cat.speaker: Client
lines: The cat had motive, opportunity, and a tiny bow tie.

case001.phone.hazel_accepts.speaker: Hazel
lines: Fine. I will investigate the disappearance of logic.
But if this turns out to be a metaphor, I charge double.
